title: clerodendrum hainanense
intro: Clerodendrum hainanense, also known as the Hainan glorybower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum hainanense include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, while also having anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
